summary: CV Talent & Workforce census — enrichment (~20-field schema, Sonnet workers, 1 site visit + 1 search)
logs: Batch 1: enriching 40 talent/workforce entities (Sonnet 4.6, 1 site visit + 1 search)...

enrichment.name: Signature Executive Suites
enrichment.full_address: 777 E Tahquitz Canyon Way, Suite 200, Palm Springs, CA
enrichment.size_hint: 20,000+ sq ft Class A executive suites
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site returns HTTP 500 to bots; appears on CoworkingCafe, CommercialCafe, and CoworkingMag but own domain is inaccessible to crawlers, suppressing direct indexing.

enrichment.full_address: 68718 E Palm Canyon Dr, Suite 301, Cathedral City, CA 92234

enrichment.name: The Syndicate

enrichment.size_hint: 1 office, conference room seats 8, multiple private offices + shared desks
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own site surfaces but authoritative coverage is dominated by coworking aggregators (CoworkingCafe, CoworkingMag, Yelp, Office Hub) rather than organic editorial mentions; no Google Business Profile or local news presence evident.

enrichment.name: Vanmar Executive Suites
enrichment.full_address: 77-711 Flora Rd, Palm Desert, CA 92211
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Present on Yelp, Nextdoor, Facebook, and YellowPages but lacks schema markup and is absent from major coworking aggregators (WeWork, Coworker.com), limiting agent-surface reach.

enrichment.name: Boulevard Workspace
enrichment.full_address: 81161 Indio Blvd, Indio, CA 92201
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own site ranks below aggregators (LiquidSpace, CoworkingCafe, CommercialCafe, Yelp) for the obvious brand query; no structured data limits direct agent discovery.

enrichment.name: Desert Valley Employment Agency
enrichment.full_address: 1091 N Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92262
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Confirmed local agency with a physical address and Yelp listing but no live website found; aggregator/directory entries dominate all relevant search queries — the business has near-zero independent online presence.

enrichment.name: Awesome Event Staffing
enrichment.full_address: unknown
enrichment.credential_displayed: RBS certified staff; Riverside County food handler cards (staff-level, not a firm license number)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: 36+ years in business with broad CV coverage but surfaces only via own site, GigSalad, and Facebook — no Yelp profile or local-press presence detected in top results.

enrichment.name: American Bartending School
enrichment.subcategory: adult vocational & trade schools / training providers
enrichment.full_address: 75110 St Charles Pl #8, Palm Desert, CA 92211
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: School claims to be the nation's oldest bartending school (est. 1969) but its registered domain resolves to a thin PrimeListing directory page; authoritative web presence is minimal relative to brand history.

enrichment.name: Professional Career Training
enrichment.subcategory: adult vocational & trade schools / training providers
enrichment.full_address: 75110 St Charles Pl, Palm Desert, CA 92211
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Entity surfaces only in a single blocked business-registry aggregator; the physical address is better known under co-tenant "American Bartending School" than under this registered name.

enrichment.name: SBBCollege (Santa Barbara Business College) — Rancho Mirage
enrichment.subcategory: adult vocational & trade schools / training providers
enrichment.full_address: 34275 Monterey Ave, Rancho Mirage, CA
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Campus closed after 2020 acquisition by San Joaquin Valley College; Yelp confirmed closed as of March 2026. Site unreachable (ECONNREFUSED). Search surfaces the listing but under a closed/legacy state.
enrichment._src_name: SBBCollege (Santa Barbara Business College) — Rancho Mirage
